chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-5817 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 26.01.2026. Mr. Abdul Sami Mahar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. K.A Vaswani, Asstt. Advocate General a/w Dr. Ubedullah, DHO South and Tahir Ghaffar Khanzada, Provincial Inspector of Drugs. --------------- The Petitioner is apparently aggrieved by the Order / decision made by the Respondent No.2, being the Provincial Quality Control Board vide letter dated 14.11.2025 (Annexure- A at Page 13 of the Court file) and has assailed the same through an Appeal before the Respondent No.1 in terms of the Rule 20 of Sindh Drug Rules 1979 ((Annexure- E at Pages 81-103 of the Court file). Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner would be satisfied if such appeal were to be decided without undue delay. The learned A.A.G submits comments of the Respondent No.2 and undertakes that the aforementioned Appeal would be decided in accordance with law through a speaking Order after hearing the Petitioner and all concerned within a period of 30 days from today. Let the needful be ensured accordingly. The Petition stands disposed of in such terms. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
